creator: m@kappa.st
text:
Thanks for reporting. 

Can you give it a try running GLPI 9.5.7 (updated 2 days ago)? I will do some tests on a FreeBSD 13.0 too.

Were you on a fresh install or an upgrade? There was a related issue in 2018 that has been fixed upstream in https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/issues/4286.

Last time I tested a fresh glpi 9.5.5 with apache24 and FreeBSD 12.2 I did not have this issue.

Is this glpi cron job running on a fresh install?
